philippines.title: ₱5K for qualified college students in Lapu-Lapu City aid program
philippines.description:
LAPU-LAPU CITY, Cebu- Qualified college students in Lapu-Lapu City may receive ₱5,000 each per semester, under a newly approved assistance program. And they can drive that amount up with good grades. Lapu-Lapu City Mayor Cynthia “Cindi” King-Chan has signed Ordinance 17-062-2026, establishing the Educational Assistance for Higher Education Program of the City of Lapu-Lapu (EAHELLC). The program will provide financial assistance to qualified college students who are facing financial challenges and need support, whether they attend state universities, local colleges, or other recognized higher education institutions. Lapu-Lapu City college assist starts at ₱5,000 per sem READ ALSO: Free tuition back […]...
Keep on reading: ₱5K for qualified college students in Lapu-Lapu City aid program

philippines.title: NDA ‘very optimistic’ dairy production will increase by 22.4%
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines — The National Dairy Authority (NDA) is confident that the country’s dairy production will increase this year due to the arrival of imported dairy animals and the construction of additional stock farms. NDA Administrator Marcus Antonius Andaya said the agency was “very, very optimistic” about local dairy output reaching 53 million liters in 2026. If achieved, this would reflect a 22.4-percent increase from last year’s actual production of 43.3 million liters. Andaya likewise expressed confidence in attaining a milk sufficiency level of 3.3 percent this year, up from the previous target of 2.33 percent. READ: NDA seeks P1.5-B for […]...
Keep on reading: NDA ‘very optimistic’ dairy production will increase by 22.4%

philippines.title: Gwendoline Soriano clinches early victory in Binibining Pilipinas 2026
philippines.description:
Seasoned contender Gwendoline Soriano asserted her frontrunner status in the 2026 Binibining Pilipinas pageant with an early win that she copped at a recent event for the national competition. The Binibining Pilipinas delegate from Baguio was proclaimed “Miss Snow Caps Radiance” at the launching of the national pageant’s partnership with the glutathione supplement brand, held at the Monet Ballroom of Novotel Manila Araneta City in Quezon City on Tuesday afternoon, May 19. Soriano earned her sash by amassing the most votes from members of the media and online content creators who attended the event, which was also graced by the […]...
Keep on reading: Gwendoline Soriano clinches early victory in Binibining Pilipinas 2026

energy.title: Energean Slashes Dividend After Israel Gas Shutdown Cuts Output
energy.description: UK-based oil and gas producer Energean plc on Wednesday slashed its first-quarter dividend and full-year production outlook following a 41-day halt to production at a gas field offshore Israel due to the Middle East conflict. Energean suspended production at the Karish platform offshore Israel in early March under orders by the Israeli Energy Ministry. Operations resumed on April 9, after the ministry instructed the company to restore production following the announcement of the U.S.-Iran ceasefire. The Israeli government’s go-ahead permitted…
